DESCRIPTION: Unique identifier for each user
Full name of the user
User's email address (used for login)
Hashed password for secure authentication
User's contact phone number
User's date of birth
User's full residential or business address
Short biography or profile description of the user
User role (e.g., Farmer, Buyer, Admin, Vendor)
Unique identifier for each machinery listing
Name/title of the machinery
Selling price of the machinery
Condition of machinery (New, Used, Refurbished)
Machinery category (Tractor, Harvester, etc.)
Detailed description of the machinery
Available stock quantity
URL or file path to the machinery image
Unique identifier for each order
Date and time when the order was placed
Total payable amount for the order
Current order status (Pending, Confirmed, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled)
ID of the user who placed the order
Unique identifier for each order item
ID of the parent order
Name of the machinery/product ordered
Price per unit at the time of ordering
Quantity of items ordered
URL of the image of the ordered item
Unique identifier for each cart item
ID of the user whose cart it belongs to
Name of the item added to cart
Current price of the item
Quantity added to cart
Category of the cart item
Unique identifier for each wishlist item
ID of the user who added the item
Name of the item in wishlist
Current price of the wishlist item
Category of the wishlist item
Unique identifier for each chat message
ID of the user who sent the message
ID of the user who receives the message
Actual text content of the message
Date and time when the message was sent
Unique identifier for each agricultural item
Name of the agricultural item/product
Category (Seeds, Fertilizers, Tools, Pesticides, etc.)
Price of the agri item
Available quantity in stock
Detailed description of the item
URL or file path to the item image
